title: I giorni bianchi
overview: The lack of communication in the times of Lockdown in a drama that describes a family during quarantine: the wife desperately wants to be a mother. His brother, a mentally ill man, lives in an endless football dream and Franco seems to be the only one who still remains connected to reality. As the days pass, however, madness takes possession of the house: who will be the last to remain lucid? And for how much longer?
